record.field:
IT Hardware Sales & Service

Company is a specialized IT Sales Establishment that focuses on providing a diverse selection of IT components for sale. The product contains laptops, RAM, accessories, CCTV cameras, and other related items. In addition to product sales, it is also offering installation and repair services for these components.

IT Hardware Sales & Service Configuration Business Flow Flow 1: Buy Laptop & Accessories Flow 2: B2C eCommerce Sale Flow 3: Bulk Order Flow 4: Installation Service Flow 5: Repair Service

Configuration

Product Specification: Laptops have attributes (Brand, CPU, ...) & variants (RAM, HD)
Part Code: Manage unique codes for IT components.
Lot & Serial Numbers: Track products with lot and serial numbers.
Warranty Days: On products, if you enable "Expiration Date", you can set a warranty duration

Business Flow

Flow 1: Buy Laptop & Accessories


Purchase Order Management

  • Create a Request for Quotation to "" for one “ThinkPad X1 Carbon 35.56cms - 12th Gen Intel i7”
  • Send the RFQ by email
  • Once you get the prices from the vendor, update the prices and lead times and confirm the order.

Receipt

Once the order is confirmed, we are ready to receive it in a few days.
When the shipment arrives with the new products, open the barcode App:

  • scan a product from the receipt screen
  • that filters on pending receipts containing this product
  • Pick the right one and scan the product received.
  • scan, or record, the lot number
  • validate the receipt

Flow 2: B2C eCommerce Sale

From the Ecommerce

  • Visit the B2C Shop Choose products and compare with related products. (" ThinkPad X1 Nano 33.02cms - 12th Gen Intel i7 "," ThinkPad X1 Carbon 35.56cms - 12th Gen Intel i7 " ).
  • Finalize the product process for the checkout.
  • Set the customer to define the shipping address.
  • Then pay for the order.

Later, in the Inventory apps, the worker uses the list of orders to deliver in the "Delivery Orders" section.

Flow 3: Bulk Order

B2B Market(Bulk Order)

  • From the website go to the top menu "Bulk Order".
  • This customized form will create an opportunity in the CRM, with the right information.

Salesperson meet client

From the CRM, schedule a meeting. As you meet the client, you can create a quotation and use the product catalog. to easily present products to the client and record his order.

Flow 4: Installation Service

Quotation & Sale

To create a quotation, select the template "CCTV Installation Setup". That fill in two products:

  • CCTV Camera: 1 Unit
  • Installation Service: 1 Unit

Confirm Sales Order

Deliver products

You can deliver the 1 product("CCTV Camera") from the inventory application. Use the barcode scanner, or the backend, up to you.

Warranty date for above product will be calculated from the date of delivery.(Through Studio, Automated Action-Update Warranty Date)

For the Some Business warranty will start from date of the delivery.

Installation - CCTV Camera

Assign the field service engineer on the Task of "Installation Service".

After the planning, field service engineer will visit the client place and start working on installation, they move the task "In Progress" and then "Done" when it's finished and sign the service report.

Flow 5: Repair Service

If the product are in warranty and customer has any complaint which need to repair the service. we can repair the product and generate the Invoice if required.

To do that,

  • Go to website and Helpdesk form
  • when open the form choose product ('ThinkPad X1 Carbon 35.56cms - 12th Gen Intel i7') and serial number('CNC012345') and submit ticket.
  • support ticket will be created from backend.
  • Open the ticket from backend, system will be displayed the Warranty Date('24/08/2024') of that selected serial number(through Studio).

Generate Repair Order

To do that,

  • Create the Repair order from Helpdesk->Repair Order.
  • Take the product in our internal location from customer (WH/Repair).
  • Repair the product , they move the Order to "Under Repair", and then "Repaired" when it's finished.
If the product is under warranty, then there is no need to create an invoice, and if the product is out of warranty, then the user can send a quotation for the repair. Once the customer confirms the rate, the user can start repairing, and after the repair, we will give the customer an invoice for the same.
